section_name: Turning on curve or crest of grade prohibited
text: No vehicle shall be turned so as to proceed in the opposite direction upon any curve, or upon the approach to, or near, the crest of a grade, where such vehicle cannot be seen by the driver of any other vehicle approaching from either direction within 500 feet. A violation of this section is a noncriminal traffic infraction, punishable as a moving violation as provided in chapter 318.
markdown:
### Chapter 316. State Unif. Traffic Control
##### § 316.152 — Turning on curve or crest of grade prohibited

No vehicle shall be turned so as to proceed in the opposite direction upon any curve, or upon the approach to, or near, the crest of a grade, where such vehicle cannot be seen by the driver of any other vehicle approaching from either direction within 500 feet. A violation of this section is a noncriminal traffic infraction, punishable as a moving violation as provided in chapter 318.

A violation of this section is a noncriminal traffic infraction, punishable as a moving violation as provided in chapter 318.
